mapper.select: SELECT * FROM org_department WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC

SELECT d.id AS dept_id, d.name AS dept_name, COUNT(e.id) AS employee_count FROM org_department d LEFT JOIN emp_employee e ON d.id = e.dept_id AND e.is_deleted = 0 WHERE d.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY d.id, d.name ORDER BY d.sort ASC
